headlines.title: 3 Nasdaq 100 Stocks Worth Your Attention
headlines.summary: The Nasdaq 100 (^NDX) is where investors find some of the most innovative and disruptive companies shaping the future. A select few continue to execute at a high level, growing their market dominance and delivering strong returns.

headlines.title: The Keg Is Now Available for Delivery Exclusively on DoorDash
headlines.summary: TORONTO, July 23, 2026--The Keg Steakhouse + Bar, a premium Canadian steakhouse known for its welcoming hospitality and beloved menu, announced today its delivery debut exclusively on DoorDash. Available across Canada and the United States, many of The Keg’s signature steaks, delicious appetizers, and classic desserts can now be delivered to your door.

headlines.title: Amazon Workers on Food Stamps Nearly Tripled, While Company Spends $200 Billion on AI
headlines.summary: A government watchdog report finds a familiar gap widening between what Amazon's workers take home and what its shareholders celebrate, and the company's boldest spending plan yet sits at the center of the tension.

headlines.title: Washington Eyes Chinese AI Models as U.S. Usage Nears 60%
headlines.summary: The Trump administration is reviewing potential restrictions as Chinese models gain traction across U.S. companies and AI infrastructure providers.

headlines.title: Domino’s Shrugs Off Mixed Q2 Results, Promises Better Days Ahead
headlines.summary: Though Domino's Pizza didn't meet its same-store sales estimates in Q2, the company is the dominant legacy pizza brand right now, according to company officials, who said its overall competitive position has never been stronger while its competitors have never…

description: DoorDash, Inc., together with its subsidiaries, operates a commerce platform that connects merchants, consumers, and dashers in the United States and internationally. The company operates DoorDash Marketplace, Wolt Marketplace, and Deliveroo Marketplace, which provide various services, such as customer acquisition, demand generation, order fulfillment, merchandising, payment processing, and customer support. It also offers consumer membership programs, DashPass, Wolt+, and Deliveroo Plus; advertising as a value-added service through its marketplaces; and white-label delivery fulfillment services, as well as services that help merchants establish online ordering, build branded mobile apps, manage reservations and in-store dining, manage consumer relationships, enable tableside order and pay, and improve customer support. The company was formerly known as Palo Alto Delivery Inc. and changed its name to DoorDash, Inc. in 2015. DoorDash, Inc. was founded in 2013 and is headquartered in San Francisco, California.
